revision.comment: including {{Religious text primary}}
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Kk]] to [[Category:bb]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages to be overwritten]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:Categories tagged in Automatic wikipedia redirects]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]] on (CatAlot)

revision.text:
stack begin Parent monthly clean up category The following templates will place articles into this category: tlg|Circular, tlg|Primary sources, tlg|Unreliable sources, tlg|Verify credibility, tlg|Cite check, tlg|User-generated, tlg|Irrelevant citation, tlg|Third-party, tlg|Only primary sources, tlg|Obsolete source, tlg|Unreliable medical source, tlg|Better source, and tlg|Religious text primary. For articles containing self-published sources, see [[:Category:Articles with self-published sources]]. stack end
[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[en:Articles lacking reliable references]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

stack begin Parent monthly clean up category The following templates will place articles into this category: tlg|Circular, tlg|Primary sources, tlg|Unreliable sources, tlg|Verify credibility, tlg|Cite check, tlg|User-generated, tlg|Irrelevant citation, tlg|Third-party, tlg|Only primary sources, tlg|Obsolete source, tlg|Unreliable medical source, tlg|Better source, and tlg|Religious text primary. For articles containing self-published sources, see [[:Category:Articles with self-published sources]]. stack end
[[en:Articles lacking reliable references]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Images]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
stack begin Parent monthly clean up category The following templates will place articles into this category: tlg|Circular, tlg|Primary sources, tlg|Unreliable sources, tlg|Verify credibility, tlg|Cite check, tlg|User-generated, tlg|Irrelevant citation, tlg|Third-party, tlg|Only primary sources, tlg|Obsolete source, tlg|Unreliable medical source, tlg|Better source, and tlg|Religious text primary. For articles containing self-published sources, see [[:Category:Articles with self-published sources]]. stack end

[[Category:Images]]

stack begin Parent monthly clean up category The following templates will place articles into this category: tlg|Circular, tlg|Primary sources, tlg|Unreliable sources, tlg|Verify credibility, tlg|Cite check, tlg|User-generated, tlg|Irrelevant citation, tlg|Third-party, tlg|Only primary sources, tlg|Obsolete source, tlg|Unreliable medical source, tlg|Better source, and tlg|Religious text primary. revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
revision.text:
stack begin Parent monthly clean up category The following templates will place articles into this category: tlg|Circular, tlg|Primary sources, tlg|Unreliable sources, tlg|Verify credibility, tlg|Cite check, tlg|User-generated, tlg|Irrelevant citation, tlg|Third-party, tlg|Only primary sources, tlg|Obsolete source, tlg|Unreliable medical source, tlg|Better source, and tlg|Religious text primary. For articles containing self-published sources, see [[:Category:Articles with self-published sources]]. stack end
[[en:Articles lacking reliable references]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
revision.text:
stack begin Parent monthly clean up category The following templates will place articles into this category: tlg|Circular, tlg|Primary sources, tlg|Unreliable sources, tlg|Verify credibility, tlg|Cite check, tlg|User-generated, tlg|Irrelevant citation, tlg|Third-party, tlg|Only primary sources, tlg|Obsolete source, tlg|Unreliable medical source, tlg|Better source, and tlg|Religious text primary. For articles containing self-published sources, see [[:Category:Articles with self-published sources]]. stack end

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
